# iNNfo Гўв‚¬вЂќ Full Site Content

> The hub for the iNNfo ecosystem.
> Generator: https://skills.innv0.com/innv0-web-design-guide

---

# iNNfo Гўв‚¬вЂќ the iNNfo modeling hub

Model, edit, and validate iNNfo knowledge models. iNNfo is the hub for the iNNfo ecosystem.

## What is iNNfo?

A monorepo that ties the iNNfo ecosystem together:
- **iNNfo Modeler** (`innfo-editor`) Гўв‚¬вЂќ a Vue 3 workspace editor. Open any folder, parse it into one normalized model tree, edit, and validate in the browser.
- **@innv0/innfo-core** Гўв‚¬вЂќ the shared TypeScript parser, resolver, validator.
- **@innv0/innfo-mcp** Гўв‚¬вЂќ an MCP server exposing iNNfo as semantic tools for AI agents.
- **Spec Chain** Гўв‚¬вЂќ defiNNe -> iNNfo -> Templates -> Models.

## How the iNNfo Modeler works

1. Open workspace Гўв‚¬вЂќ pick a folder via the File System Access API (or resume a recent one)
2. Single parse pass Гўв‚¬вЂќ one recursive pass folds every `_NN.md` file and its structural children into one normalized tree
3. Edit & validate Гўв‚¬вЂќ sidebar tree + block sheets / table view + automatic validation against the iNNfo spec

## Ecosystem Architecture

- Level 0: defiNNe Гўв‚¬вЂќ Meta-specification, RFC 2119, versioning
- Level 1: iNNfo Гўв‚¬вЂќ Central spec; single-file `_NN.md` models with YAML frontmatter
- Level 2: Templates Гўв‚¬вЂќ business, procedures, organization
- Level 3: Models Гўв‚¬вЂќ Concrete data instances

## Built for AI agents

- **innfo-mcp** Гўв‚¬вЂќ a stdio MCP server with seven semantic tools (`list_models`, `read_model`, `get_spec`, `get_template`, `validate_model`, `apply_change`, `validate_model_url`).
- **traNNsform** Гўв‚¬вЂќ an agent-driven import/export pipeline: turn source files into iNNfo models, or export a model to a self-contained HTML visualizer.
- **Use iNNfo with AI** Гўв‚¬вЂќ a built-in checklist to connect your workspace to Claude Code, Google Antigravity, or OpenCode.

## Monorepo structure

```
iNNfo/
ГўвЂќЕ“ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ apps/
ГўвЂќвЂљ   ГўвЂќвЂќГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ innfo-editor/     <- Vue 3 workspace editor (the iNNfo Modeler)
ГўвЂќЕ“ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ packages/
ГўвЂќвЂљ   ГўвЂќЕ“ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ innfo-core/       <- TS parser, resolver, validator
ГўвЂќвЂљ   ГўвЂќЕ“ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ innfo-mcp/        <- MCP server for AI agents
ГўвЂќвЂљ   ГўвЂќвЂќГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ pipeline-gates/   <- Validation & integration gates
ГўвЂќЕ“ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ specs/                <- defiNNe, iNNfo, templates, samples
ГўвЂќЕ“ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ traNNsform/           <- Agent-driven import/export pipeline
ГўвЂќвЂќГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ docs/                 <- This website
```

---

# About iNNfo

The monorepo that ties the iNNfo ecosystem together.

## Architecture

npm workspaces monorepo Гўв‚¬вЂќ one editor app (`innfo-editor`), three packages (`innfo-core`, `innfo-mcp`, `pipeline-gates`), the spec chain (`specs/`), the agent pipeline (`traNNsform/`), and this website (`docs/`).

## App

**iNNfo Modeler** (`@innv0/innfo-editor`) Гўв‚¬вЂќ a Vue 3 workspace editor with the File System Access API, a single recursive parse pass into one normalized model graph, block sheets / table view / metamodel-driven forms, automatic validation, a graph viewer, matrix grids, and IndexedDB handle persistence.

## Packages

- **@innv0/innfo-core** Гўв‚¬вЂќ framework-agnostic TypeScript library: the iNNfo parser, model types, IO drivers, validator, and parent-spec-chain resolver.
- **@innv0/innfo-mcp** Гўв‚¬вЂќ an MCP server (stdio) wrapping innfo-core with seven semantic tools for AI agents.
- **@innv0/pipeline-gates** Гўв‚¬вЂќ validation and integration gates for iNNfo model pipelines.

## Specifications

- Level 0: defiNNe Гўв‚¬вЂќ Meta-specification
- Level 1: iNNfo Гўв‚¬вЂќ Central spec; single-file `_NN.md` models
- Level 2: Templates Гўв‚¬вЂќ business, procedures, organization
- Level 3: Models Гўв‚¬вЂќ Concrete data instances (Ghostbusters, Engineering Team)
